title: Onsen jôwa: Yubune de momi gaeri
original_title: 温泉情話 湯船で揉みがえり
overview: Asuka, who lost her father and mother due to a natural disaster, revisits the hot spring inn that they once visited. Asuka hears that there is a way to pick up Nakai's vegetables or reunite with a dead person, and begins training.
